:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="48%"}

- Interactions are allowed terms in the Lagrangian:

$$
\mathcal L=\mathcal L_{\rm free}+\mathcal L_{\rm int}.
$$

- They create, destroy, or transform field quanta.

- For example, QED contains the vertex

$$
\mathcal L_{\rm int}=-e\,\bar\psi\gamma^\mu A_\mu\psi .
$$

- In a diagram, force is encoded as exchange of a virtual field quantum.

:::

::: {.column width="52%"}
```{=html}
<div class="interaction-exchange-panel">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 640 410" role="img" aria-label="Force as exchange of a field quantum and its dependence on spatial dimension">
    <defs>
      <filter id="interaction-glow" x="-30%" y="-30%" width="160%" height="160%">
        <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/>
        <feMerge>
          <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
          <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
        </feMerge>
      </filter>
      <linearGradient id="exchangeWave" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
        <stop offset="0" stop-color="#8ec5ff"/>
        <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#ffcc66"/>
        <stop offset="1" stop-color="#8ec5ff"/>
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>

    <rect x="5" y="5" width="630" height="400" rx="18" fill="#02070c" stroke="#244258" stroke-width="2"/>

    <text x="38" y="48" fill="#f2f2f2" font-size="26" font-weight="700">Force = exchange of a field quantum</text>
    <text x="38" y="76" fill="#b7d2e6" font-size="17">The mediator appears as an internal line in the amplitude.</text>

    <g filter="url(#interaction-glow)">
      <circle cx="122" cy="154" r="18" fill="#8ec5ff"/>
      <circle cx="398" cy="154" r="18" fill="#8ec5ff"/>
      <text x="106" y="196" fill="#f2f2f2" font-size="18">charge</text>
      <text x="382" y="196" fill="#f2f2f2" font-size="18">charge</text>

      <path d="M142 154 C174 114 204 194 236 154 C268 114 298 194 330 154 C356 122 374 144 380 154"
            fill="none" stroke="url(#exchangeWave)" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M274 109 L292 109 L292 88 L317 124 L292 160 L292 139 L274 139 Z"
            fill="#ffcc66" opacity="0.9"/>
      <text x="224" y="98" fill="#ffcc66" font-size="20" font-weight="700">virtual mediator</text>
      <text x="247" y="223" fill="#d0d0d0" font-size="19">γ, W, Z, g, H, ...</text>
    </g>

    <g transform="translate(34,248)">
      <text x="0" y="0" fill="#f2f2f2" font-size="21" font-weight="700">For a massless mediator in d spatial dimensions:</text>
      <text x="0" y="34" fill="#d0d0d0" font-size="20">flux spreads over</text>
      <text x="190" y="34" fill="#8ec5ff" font-size="22" font-weight="700">S<tspan baseline-shift="sub" font-size="14">d-1</tspan> ∝ r<tspan baseline-shift="super" font-size="14">d-1</tspan></text>
      <text x="0" y="66" fill="#d0d0d0" font-size="20">therefore</text>
      <text x="112" y="66" fill="#ffcc66" font-size="23" font-weight="700">F<tspan baseline-shift="sub" font-size="15">d</tspan>(r) ∝ 1 / r<tspan baseline-shift="super" font-size="15">d-1</tspan></text>

      <g transform="translate(0,88)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="166" height="58" rx="8" fill="#07131b" stroke="#315a73" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="14" y="22" fill="#8ec5ff" font-size="17" font-weight="700">1 spatial dim.</text>
        <text x="14" y="49" fill="#f2f2f2" font-size="21">F ∝ const</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(186,88)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="166" height="58" rx="8" fill="#07131b" stroke="#315a73" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="14" y="22" fill="#8ec5ff" font-size="17" font-weight="700">2 spatial dims.</text>
        <text x="14" y="49" fill="#f2f2f2" font-size="21">F ∝ 1/r</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(372,88)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="166" height="58" rx="8" fill="#07131b" stroke="#315a73" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="14" y="22" fill="#8ec5ff" font-size="17" font-weight="700">3 spatial dims.</text>
        <text x="14" y="49" fill="#f2f2f2" font-size="21">F ∝ 1/r<tspan baseline-shift="super" font-size="13">2</tspan></text>
      </g>
    </g>
  </svg>
</div>
```
:::
::::

::: {.force-note}
The mediator mass changes the range: in 3d, $V(r)\sim e^{-m r}/r$.
:::
